footer.description: Independent advice for freelancers and entrepreneurs. We help you with insurance and business security.

cookie.title: Cookie settings
cookie.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. Some cookies are necessary for the site to function, while others help us analyze and improve the site.
cookie.gdpr: Compliant with GDPR and the Telecommunications Act

home.trustBadge: Your partner for freelancers for 10+ years

home.usp1: Personal contact, always a real person on the line
home.usp2: Unique combined professional & business liability policy

diensten.title: Our
diensten.subtitle: Insurance, administration, legal advice and screening — everything you need as an independent professional. We connect you with the best partners for every service.
diensten.ctaTitle: Not sure which service you need?
diensten.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free consultation. Together we'll look at which services fit your situation and profession — no obligations.

verzekeringenPage.title: Insurance for
verzekeringenPage.subtitle: As an independent entrepreneur, you are responsible for your own business security. Discover which insurance fits your situation and profession.
verzekeringenPage.badge: ✨ Exclusive: Unique combined professional & business liability policy
verzekeringenPage.taxDeductible: Premiums for business insurance are often tax-deductible as business expenses. This makes your insurance much more affordable!
verzekeringenPage.ctaTitle: Not sure which insurance you need?
verzekeringenPage.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free consultation. Together we'll look at which insurance fits your profession and situation — no obligations.

voorWie.title: Who is
voorWie.subtitle: Whether you're just starting out or have been freelancing for years — we help freelancers at every stage and in every field.
voorWie.ctaSubtitle: No worries! We help freelancers in all sectors. Contact us and we'll look at your specific situation together.

zoWerkenWij.title: How we work
zoWerkenWij.subtitle: Personal advice without hassle. We help you find the right insurance in three simple steps — honest, transparent and at your pace.
zoWerkenWij.step1Desc: We start with a no-obligation call of 15-20 minutes. We listen to your situation, profession and wishes.
zoWerkenWij.step2Desc: Based on our conversation, we compile a clear overview of relevant insurance options.
zoWerkenWij.step3Desc: Choose our advice? We handle the application for you. You receive the policy and we remain available for questions.
zoWerkenWij.whySubtitle: We believe in honest advice and personal contact. No sales pitches, just a partner who thinks along with you.
zoWerkenWij.persoonlijkDesc: You always speak with a real advisor, not a call center.
zoWerkenWij.onafhankelijkDesc: We are not tied to one insurer.
zoWerkenWij.directContactDesc: You have direct contact with us.
zoWerkenWij.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free consultation and discover within 15 minutes which insurance fits your situation.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about insurance, our services and being a freelancer.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Feel free to contact us. We're happy to help with all your questions about insurance and freelancing.

partners.title: Proud to work with our partners!
partners.subtitle: At ZP Zaken, we ensure you can work worry-free. We do this in collaboration with our partners.
partners.becomePartnerTitle: Want to become a partner of ZP Zaken?
partners.becomePartnerSubtitle: Are you an insurer, pension advisor or financial service provider? We are always looking for reliable partners.
partners.questionsSubtitle: Want to know more about our collaborations? Feel free to contact us.

overOns.title: About ZP Zaken
overOns.subtitle: We believe that freelancers deserve honest, personal advice. No sales pitches — just well arranged.
overOns.missieP1: As a freelancer, you have enough on your plate. You focus on your craft, your clients and running your business. Insurance and business security shouldn't be a headache.
overOns.missieP2: That's why we started ZP Zaken: to help independent entrepreneurs with clear, independent advice. We take the time to understand your situation and only advise what you truly need.
overOns.quote: "Freelancers deserve the same security as employees, but in a way that fits the entrepreneurial life."
overOns.teamSubtitle: A small, dedicated team ready to help you with all your questions.
overOns.valuesSubtitle: Our core values determine how we work and how we interact with you.
overOns.ctaTitle: Want to get to know us?
overOns.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a non-binding introductory call. We'd love to tell you more about how we can help you.

historie.title: 10 Years ZP Zaken
historie.subtitle: From startup to market leader. Discover our journey and why thousands of freelancers trust us.
historie.quoteText: For entrepreneurs, by entrepreneurs. That's been our promise since day one.
historie.timelineSubtitle: A journey of 10+ years of entrepreneurship, innovation and helping thousands of freelancers.
historie.timelineScroll: Scroll down and discover our milestones!
historie.valuesSubtitle: Our core values define everything we do — for entrepreneurs, by entrepreneurs.
historie.ctaSubtitle: Become part of the ZP Zaken family. Discover what we can do for you and your business.

kennisbank.title: The latest knowledge articles from ZP Zaken
kennisbank.subtitle: Stay up to date with the latest developments regarding legislation, insurance and everything you need to know as a freelancer.
kennisbank.noArticles: No articles found in this category.

collectieveInkoop.metaTitle: Group Purchasing for Freelancers | ZP Zaken
collectieveInkoop.metaDesc: Join the ZP Zaken collective and benefit from exclusive group deals on energy and software.
collectieveInkoop.heroSubtitle: We gather entrepreneurs and let major suppliers compete. You benefit from the group discount.
collectieveInkoop.heroUsp3: Only participate if the deal is good enough
collectieveInkoop.step2: We gather minimum number of participants
collectieveInkoop.activePilotsDesc: Choose a pilot and register without obligation.
collectieveInkoop.signUpDesc: Fill in your details. No strings attached.
collectieveInkoop.name: Name
collectieveInkoop.whyP4: ZP Zaken bundles entrepreneurs and negotiates on behalf of the group. Transparent, independent and without obligations.
collectieveInkoop.transparencyDesc: If you decide to sign a contract, ZP Zaken may receive compensation from the supplier. You never pay extra through our involvement.
collectieveInkoop.faq2q: What if the deal is disappointing?
collectieveInkoop.faq2a: Then you don't have to do anything.
collectieveInkoop.faq3a: As soon as the minimum number of participants is reached.
collectieveInkoop.newsletterTitle: Want to be the first to benefit from group deals?
collectieveInkoop.newsletterDesc: Sign up and receive updates about new group purchasing initiatives.
collectieveInkoop.newsletterSuccessDesc: You'll receive updates about future group purchasing initiatives.
collectieveInkoop.pilotStroomDesc: Energy contracts are individually arranged. We're bundling 100 freelancers and letting energy suppliers bid on the entire group.
collectieveInkoop.pilotSoftwareDesc: Accounting software, CRM, AI tools and hosting are often sold at standard prices. With enough interest, we negotiate volume discounts for freelancers.
